site.title: Halim Efe Tuzlu | Product Designer & CPO
site.description: Istanbul-based Product Designer and CPO focused on AI products, design systems, UI/UX, brand identity, and product strategy.

hero.headline: Hi, I'm Efe, a product designer and CPO based in Istanbul, building AI products, design systems and memorable digital experiences.

services.title: Product
items: Research, IA, user flows and product UX
Design systems, analytics loops and iteration

services.title: Web
items: Responsive web interfaces and landing pages
Front-end design with HTML, CSS and JavaScript

services.title: Motion
items: Campaign video, post-production and motion direction

services.title: Brand
items: Logo, identity and scalable visual systems
Digital communication and campaign art direction

services.title: Artwork
items: Editorial, political and music-led digital artworks
Product visuals, composition and visual storytelling

projects.title: Hant
projects.service: Product Design, Web Design, Brand Identity, Motion
projects.goal: Goal: Make AI-assisted travel planning feel simple, personal and memorable.
projects.description: AI travel app experience covering product strategy, UX flows, web presence, brand identity and motion language for a smarter trip-planning journey.

projects.title: En Kıymetlim
projects.service: Product Design, Web Design, Brand Identity
projects.goal: Goal: Create a calm parenthood experience for health tracking and child care support.
projects.description: Parent health and child care app designed as a simple ebeveynlik product, with product UX, web interface and brand system working as one experience.

projects.title: Sağlık Gelsin
projects.service: Product Design, Web Design, Brand Identity
projects.goal: Goal: Help people call trusted healthcare professionals home with confidence.
projects.description: Home healthcare booking app for requesting nurses, physiotherapists and similar care providers, shaped through service UX, web flows and brand trust signals.

projects.title: Saunakit
projects.goal: Goal: Position a portable sauna as a clean, premium and easy-to-understand wellness product.
projects.description: Brand identity system for a physical portable sauna product, focused on clear product positioning, naming support, packaging direction and visual consistency.

projects.title: Raad Kahve
projects.goal: Goal: Build a grounded coffee brand with a distinct shelf presence.
projects.description: Brand identity and packaging direction for a coffee product, balancing a warm product story with a clear visual system.

projects.title: Mambocino
projects.goal: Goal: Create a playful but polished coffee identity for a physical product.
projects.description: Coffee brand identity for a physical product, built around naming, visual language and product-ready brand elements.

projects.title: Sales Training Game
projects.goal: Goal: Make sales training more interactive, clear and memorable.
projects.description: Interactive sales training game concept with motion direction, UX rhythm and lightweight gameplay patterns for learning scenarios.

projects.title: Weltschmerz
projects.goal: Goal: Create an expressive visual atmosphere with strong editorial character.
projects.description: Artwork series focused on mood, cultural references and visual storytelling.

projects.title: Putin
projects.goal: Goal: Build a sharp political visual with clear character focus.
projects.description: Political artwork exploring portrait, tension and symbolic visual treatment.

projects.title: Tayyip
projects.goal: Goal: Create a direct political artwork with a strong poster-like read.
projects.description: Political artwork built around composition, contrast and a clear editorial point of view.

projects.title: Putin & Trump
projects.goal: Goal: Frame two political figures inside one memorable visual narrative.
projects.description: Dual-character political artwork with emphasis on visual tension, hierarchy and symbolic composition.

projects.title: Trump
projects.goal: Goal: Create a bold political portrait artwork with strong recognizability.
projects.description: Political portrait artwork designed with a poster-like composition and clear visual emphasis.

projects.title: Odoris Şişe Parfüm
projects.goal: Goal: Create a refined perfume bottle visual with premium product cues.
projects.description: Product-focused artwork for a perfume bottle, combining object presentation, lighting and visual mood.

projects.title: Travis Scott
projects.goal: Goal: Create a music-led artwork with a bold atmospheric identity.
projects.description: Music artwork inspired by performance, mood and contemporary visual culture.
